items.title: CPS Superintendent communication on FY27 operating budget priorities
items.summary: A communication from David Murphy, Superintendent of Cambridge Public Schools, outlining the priorities driving the FY27 operating budget for the district. Submitted for a Joint Roundtable/Working meeting between the City Council and School Committee. The meeting itself was cancelled, so no Council action was taken.
items.body:
A COMMUNICATION HAS BEEN RECEIVED FROM DAVID MURPHY, SUPERINTENDENT CAMBRIDGE PUBLIC SCHOOLS. REGARDING PRIORITIES DRIVING OUR FY27 OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE CAMBRIDGE PUBLIC SCHOOLS
COF 2026-15

history.action: Joint Roundtable/Working Meeting with the School Committee CANCELLED

rationale.doc.kind:COF: Item ID prefix 'COF 2026-15' indicates a Communication from Other City Officers (the CPS Superintendent)
rationale.doc.item_id:cof-2026-15: Bold ID line 'COF 2026-15' at end of agenda entry
rationale.doc.meeting_date:2026-02-23: Cover page lists 'AGENDA - FEBRUARY 23, 2026' as the meeting date (filename publish date is Feb 22)
rationale.geo.scope:citywide: FY27 operating budget covers the entire Cambridge Public Schools district; no specific school or neighborhood named
rationale.household.kids:k12: Cambridge Public Schools serves K-12 students
rationale.household.school:cps: Item is explicitly about 'CAMBRIDGE PUBLIC SCHOOLS'
rationale.topic.area:schools: Item subject is the CPS operating budget priorities
rationale.fiscal.kind:appropriation: Item concerns the 'FY27 OPERATING BUDGET' for the school district
